# BP-92 negative: errgroup.WithContext supplies cancellation propagation
lang: go
file: BP-92-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"golang.org/x/sync/errgroup"
)

func run(parent context.Context) error {
	g, ctx := errgroup.WithContext(parent)
	g.Go(func() error {
		_ = ctx
		return nil
	})
	return g.Wait()
}
